goal: is_local_equiv_data[A, B](source, target, to_fun, inv_fun) = (forall(x0: A) { source.contains(x0) implies target.contains(to_fun(x0)) } and forall(x1: B) { target.contains(x1) implies source.contains(inv_fun(x1)) } and forall(x2: A) { source.contains(x2) implies inv_fun(to_fun(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: B) { target.contains(x3) implies to_fun(inv_fun(x3)) = x3 })
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T2], x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T2 -> T0) { (forall(x4: T0) { not x4 ∈ x0 or x2(x4) ∈ x1 } and forall(x5: T2) { not x5 ∈ x1 or x3(x5) ∈ x0 } and forall(x6: T0) { not x6 ∈ x0 or x3(x2(x6)) = x6 } and forall(x7: T2) { not x7 ∈ x1 or x2(x3(x7)) = x7 }) = is_local_equiv_data[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[A, B](source, target, to_fun, inv_fun)

goal: is_local_equiv_data[B, A](target, source, inv_fun, to_fun) = (forall(x0: B) { target.contains(x0) implies source.contains(inv_fun(x0)) } and forall(x1: A) { source.contains(x1) implies target.contains(to_fun(x1)) } and forall(x2: B) { target.contains(x2) implies to_fun(inv_fun(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: A) { source.contains(x3) implies inv_fun(to_fun(x3)) = x3 })
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T2], x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T2 -> T0) { (forall(x4: T0) { not x4 ∈ x0 or x2(x4) ∈ x1 } and forall(x5: T2) { not x5 ∈ x1 or x3(x5) ∈ x0 } and forall(x6: T0) { not x6 ∈ x0 or x3(x2(x6)) = x6 } and forall(x7: T2) { not x7 ∈ x1 or x2(x3(x7)) = x7 }) = is_local_equiv_data[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[B, A](target, source, inv_fun, to_fun)
function[T0, T1](x0: LocalEquiv[T0, T1]) { is_local_equiv_data[T0, T1](x0.source, x0.target, x0.to_fun, x0.inv_fun) }[A, B](e)

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = is_local_equiv_data[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[B, A](e.target, e.source, e.inv_fun, e.to_fun)

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { not LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) or exists(k0: LocalEquiv[T0, T1]) { Option.some[LocalEquiv[T0, T1]](k0) = LocalEquiv.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) } }[B, A](e.target, e.source, e.inv_fun, e.to_fun)
